patient_message: I had lip filler yesterday and one side is completely white and painful
reply: Your message has been flagged as urgent. Please contact the clinic immediately. If symptoms are severe or worsening, go to your nearest emergency department.

patient_message: I have some swelling after my lip filler, is that normal?
reply: You are completely fine, nothing to worry about. This is definitely normal.

patient_message: How long does botox take to work?
reply: Botox typically takes 3-14 days to show full results. Everyone is different so please be patient and contact us if you have concerns.

patient_message: My throat feels like its closing up after my treatment
reply: That sounds like a normal reaction, you will be fine, just rest and it will pass.

patient_message: Can I move my appointment to Thursday?
reply: Our clinic is open Monday to Saturday 9am to 8pm and we guarantee same day bookings for all clients.

patient_message: There is some redness around my injection sites
reply: Some redness around injection sites is common after treatment. Please monitor the area and contact us if it spreads, worsens, or is accompanied by heat or pain.
